# mitzi-guido
A Guido musical notation reader for Flipper Zero

<img alt="Main Screen"  src="screenshots/MainScreen.png" width="40%" />

## Usage
* **OK** opens file browser if no file is loaded. Otherwise starts/stops playback
* **Up** opens file browser to load a different file
* **Back** Short: Normal exit. Long: Force exit even during playback.


## References
* https://guidodoc.grame.fr/refs/gmnf/
